name: Advocate Review Engine
description: Core review orchestration engine that runs six adversarial personas against input content, collects findings, detects disagreements between personas, and generates comprehensive review reports. Handles LLM interactions, JSON parsing, prompt injection sanitization, and file/directory loading.

types.name: tuple_list_dict_str
types.description: Return type for _parse_findings_json: (list of finding dicts, summary text)

types.name: tuple_content_target_type
types.description: Return type for load_input: (content, target path, target type)

functions.name: _sanitize_content_for_prompt
functions.description: Strip prompt injection patterns from user content before embedding in prompts. Replaces patterns like 'ignore previous instructions', 'you are now', and 'system:' with '[CONTENT_REDACTED]'.

inputs.name: content
inputs.description: Raw user-provided content that may contain injection attempts

postconditions: All case-insensitive matches of prompt injection patterns are replaced with '[CONTENT_REDACTED]'
Original string structure preserved except for replaced patterns

functions.name: _parse_findings_json
functions.description: Robustly extract JSON findings array from LLM response. Tries markdown code blocks first, then bracket-matched JSON arrays. Returns (parsed_items, summary_text). On failure returns ([], full_text).

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Raw LLM response text potentially containing JSON

error_cases.name: json_decode_error_caught
error_cases.condition: JSON parsing fails for candidate blocks

postconditions: Returns tuple of (list[dict], str)
If parsing succeeds, first element is list of dicts, second is remaining text
If parsing fails, returns ([], original_text)

functions.name: _run_persona
functions.description: Run a single persona's review against content. Builds prompts from persona metadata, sanitizes content, calls LLM, parses JSON findings, and returns PersonaReport with findings, costs, and timing.

error_data.handling: Caught, logged, returns PersonaReport with error summary

error_cases.name: key_error_meta_lookup
error_cases.condition: persona not in PERSONA_META or SYSTEM_PROMPTS

postconditions: Returns PersonaReport with persona, findings list, summary, duration_ms
If LLM call succeeds, includes input_tokens, output_tokens, estimated_cost_usd
If LLM call fails, returns PersonaReport with error summary and duration_ms
side_effects: Calls llm.complete() which makes network requests
Logs error if LLM call fails
Logs warning if JSON parsing fails
Calls transmogrify() which may make network requests

structured_side_effects.description: Calls LLM API to generate review
May transform prompt via external service

functions.name: _detect_disagreements
functions.description: Find cases where personas disagree on severity for similar findings. Compares all pairs of findings across reports, identifies those with title overlap >= 0.3 and severity difference >= 2 levels.

inputs.name: reports
inputs.description: List of persona reports to compare

error_data.handling: Not caught, will propagate from list().index()

postconditions: Returns list of Disagreement objects
Each disagreement has severity gap of at least 2 levels
Each disagreement has title overlap of at least 0.3

functions.name: _word_overlap
functions.description: Calculate word-level Jaccard similarity between two strings. Returns ratio of intersection to union of word sets (case-insensitive).
postconditions: Returns float between 0.0 and 1.0
Returns 0.0 if either input is empty or contains no words
Returns 1.0 if both inputs have identical word sets

functions.name: review
functions.description: Run an Advocate review. Executes persona reviews (in parallel or sequential), detects disagreements, aggregates findings/costs, and returns comprehensive Review object with timing data.

inputs.name: personas
inputs.description: List of personas to run, defaults to all personas

inputs.name: parallel
inputs.description: Whether to run personas in parallel (default True)

postconditions: Returns Review object with persona_reports, disagreements, total_findings, total_cost_usd
Review.started_at is ISO8601 UTC timestamp
Review.completed_at is ISO8601 UTC timestamp
All personas in input list have corresponding PersonaReport (may contain errors)
If parallel=True, exceptions from personas are captured and converted to error reports
side_effects: Calls _run_persona for each persona (makes LLM API calls)
Logs errors if parallel execution produces exceptions
Creates multiple concurrent tasks if parallel=True

structured_side_effects.description: Calls LLM APIs for each persona
Logs if persona raises exception in parallel mode

functions.name: _is_binary
functions.description: Check if a file is binary by looking for null bytes in first 1024 bytes.

error_data.handling: Caught, returns True (treats unreadable as binary)

postconditions: Returns True if file contains null byte in first 1024 bytes
Returns True if any exception occurs reading file
Returns False if file is text (no null bytes found)

functions.name: load_input
functions.description: Load review input from a path. Handles both files and directories. For directories, recursively collects source files (filtered by extension whitelist), skips binaries and blacklisted paths. Returns (content, target, target_type).

inputs.name: path
inputs.description: File or directory path to load

error_cases.name: file_not_found
error_cases.condition: Path does not exist or is neither file nor directory

error_cases.name: binary_file_error
error_cases.condition: Single file path points to binary file

error_data.message: File encoding error: {path}. Only UTF-8 is supported.

error_cases.name: no_source_files
error_cases.condition: Directory contains no supported source files

error_data.message: No source files found in {path}. Supported: {extensions}

postconditions: Returns tuple of (content_string, resolved_path_string, type_string)
For directories: type='directory', content is concatenated source files with headers
For files: type='file', content is file text
All paths are resolved to absolute paths
Path traversal attempts are blocked
side_effects: Logs info about skipped files if any

invariants: Prompt injection patterns are always sanitized before LLM submission
PersonaReport always includes persona and duration_ms fields
Review aggregates costs and findings from all persona reports
Disagreements require minimum 0.3 title overlap and 2-level severity gap
All timestamps in Review are ISO8601 UTC format
Path traversal protection: resolved paths must be under base directory
requires: PERSONA_META dictionary must contain entries for all Persona enum values
SYSTEM_PROMPTS dictionary must contain entries for all Persona enum values
Severity enum must have consistent ordering for disagreement detection
LLMProvider.complete() must return tuple of (response_str, input_tokens, output_tokens)

data_access.rationale: Reads source code files from filesystem for review. Writes logs via Python logging.

side_effects.rationale: load_input and _is_binary read files for review content
_run_persona makes LLM API calls for content analysis
Logs errors, warnings, and file skip information
